questions.question: Shrimp culture in India is mainly done in:

options.B: Coastal brackish water ponds

questions.question: Insemination in poultry is used to breed:

options.B: Superior high-yielding hybrid varieties

questions.question: The enzyme amylase is used in:

options.B: Industrial processing (starch to sugar conversion, textile, paper industry)

questions.question: The silk thread is extracted from the cocoon by:

options.B: Reeling – unwinding the continuous silk thread from softened cocoon in hot water

questions.question: The mite Varroa destructor is a major pest of:

options.B: Honey bees (causes varroosis/varroa mite infestation)

questions.question: Straw boards (racks) used in sericulture are called:

options.B: Chandraki / Mountages (used to support cocoon spinning by silkworms)

questions.question: Which fish is known as 'tiger of water' due to predatory nature?

options.B: Snakehead fish (Channa striata)

questions.question: Artificial reefs are used in fisheries to:

options.B: Provide habitat for fish aggregation and breeding

questions.question: Transgenic animals used in animal husbandry have:

options.B: Foreign genes incorporated to improve traits (disease resistance, growth, milk quality)

questions.question: The host plants of tasar silkworm include:

options.B: Arjun and Asan trees (oak for temperate tasar)

questions.question: Embryo transfer technology (ETT) in cattle allows:

options.B: One high-yielding donor cow to produce many offspring using multiple surrogate mothers

questions.question: Which state is the leading producer of silk in India?

options.B: Karnataka

questions.question: Pearl culture involves:

options.B: Inserting nucleus (irritant) into freshwater/marine oysters to stimulate pearl formation

questions.question: [ADVANCED] Gene therapy using retrovirus as vector is used to treat:

options.B: SCID (Severe Combined Immunodeficiency) – ADA deficiency

questions.question: [ADVANCED] Gene therapy using retrovirus as vector is used to treat:

options.B: SCID (Severe Combined Immunodeficiency) – ADA deficiency

questions.question: Gene therapy using retrovirus as vector is used to treat:

options.B: SCID (Severe Combined Immunodeficiency) – ADA deficiency

questions.question: Golden Rice is a transgenic crop engineered to produce:

options.B: Beta-carotene (provitamin A) in endosperm

questions.question: Plasmids used as vectors in recombinant DNA technology must have:

options.B: Origin of replication, selectable marker (antibiotic resistance), and restriction sites

questions.question: In DNA fingerprinting, identical twins will have:

options.B: Identical DNA fingerprint profiles

questions.question: Sticky ends (cohesive ends) are produced by:

options.B: Restriction enzymes that make staggered cuts in palindromic DNA
